title: AE Terminal View Cell Fix
description: fix the problem of the view cell slots in 1.21.1 ae2  terminals
body:
# Terminal View Cell Fix
In the original Applied Energistics 2 (AE2) 1.21.1, certain incorrect operations could prevent the pattern terminal from directly displaying the encoding slot. This mod addresses and fixes that issue.
## Q&A
Q: why is it in left

A: To avoid conflicts with the upgrade slot of the AE Wireless Terminal.
